author: Jason Heddings
description: Embed ballistics data in Obsidian notes. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Jason Heddings
manifest.description: Embed ballistics data in your notes.
manifest.name: Ballistics

name: Ballistics

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features
- indicate zero range in table (⊕) and chart (dashed line)
- add zeroOffset input for non-zero impact at zero range

## Fixes
- **(chart)** bound arrows point into the valid range
- **(test)** update header assertion for merged label/units cell

## Maintenance
- **(deps)** update actions/checkout action to v6.0.3
- **(table)** single header row with units below label

## Dependencies
- eslint → ^10.4.1
- eslint-plugin-prettier → ^5.5.6
- node → v24.16.0
- typescript-eslint → v8.60.1
- vitest → ^4.1.8
releases.name: obsidian-ballistics-0.2.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features
- trajectory chart codefence

## Fixes
- read codeblock frontmatter via ctx.frontmatter

## Maintenance
- extract parser/renderer modules and tighten input precedence

## Dependencies
- eslint → ^10.4.0
- globals → v17
- happy-dom → v20
- nano-staged → v1
- vitest → v4
releases.name: obsidian-ballistics-0.2.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features
- make wind inputs optional and hide windage columns when zero
- add optional atmosphere inputs (altitude, pressure, temperature, humidity)
- highlight energy bound rows in trajectory table
- add copy-as-markdown/csv menu to trajectory table
- reusable ballistics inputs via frontmatter and use: links

## Maintenance
- **(deps)** bump eslint-plugin-obsidianmd to ^0.3.0
- drop "Obsidian" from manifest description
releases.name: obsidian-ballistics-0.1.1

releases.description:

releases.name: obsidian-ballistics-0.1.0
